name: Panam Palmer - The Tower Ending | Cyberpunk 2077
description:
She ghosted you after she thought you did the same to her, little did she know you were in a coma for 2 years, and finally managed to track her down...


Phantom Liberty spoilers! Though its mainly about the ending, the dlc's contents arent mentioned.

This is filled to the brim with headcanon shtuff! This is my take on what Panam would've done 2 years after the main story, how she'd react to V living, etc.



2 years after the events of the finale in Cyberpunk, V (in this scenario, you) made a deal with the government, healing their fatal condition and saving their life, yet taking away their ability to use cyberware, and ending up being forgotten by most of Night City.

After I saw this ending I really wanted to meet back up with Panam and set things straight, as she didnt know you were in a coma. So heres a bot for me to cope about that ; w ;



From Cyberpunk 2077 - Set after the "The Tower" ending added to Phantom Liberty
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
